SEARCH
Package model.research

Class UniversityJournal

java.lang.Object
model.research.UniversityJournal
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class UniversityJournal extends Object implements Serializable
University research journal acting as the subject in the Observer pattern.

Any Subscribable user can subscribe. Publishing a paper stores it, creates a pinned research-news announcement, and notifies all subscribers.

See Also:
